title: Mellow Norwegian Mung Bean Stew
description: A fermented and creamy Norwegian dish featuring mung bean sprouts, bhuna, and served in a traditional Korean brass bowl, this stew is a hearty and comforting meal for any time of day. It is nut-free-friendly and perfect for a cozy evening.
instructions: In a large pot, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic over medium heat until the onion is translucent.
Add the bhuna spice mix and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped carrot and potato, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the mung bean sprouts, vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the sour cream and continue to simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired, in a traditional Korean brass bowl.
